title: Rangers ready to reignite Penrice interest - gossip
summary: Rangers are targeting AEK Athens left-back James Penrice in a potential summer transfer move. The Scottish club faces potential competition from Aberdeen for the defender's signature.
content: Rangers target a summer move for AEK Athens left-back James Penrice, while Martin Boyle's former teammate would not be surprised to see him join Aberdeen.

zh.title: 流浪者队准备重燃对佩恩里斯的兴趣 - 转会八卦
zh.summary: 流浪者队在潜在的夏季转会中瞄准雅典AEK左后卫詹姆斯·佩恩里斯。这家苏格兰俱乐部面临来自阿伯丁的潜在竞争，争夺这位后卫。

title: 'Superhuman' managers shouldn't have to ask for help - Beard's family on loss
summary: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard has spoken publicly about the severe emotional toll of football management. They are advocating for systemic changes to better support managers' mental health and wellbeing.
content: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard tell BBC Sport about the emotional burden of football management, and the changes they want to see.

zh.title: "超人"般的经理不应该被迫寻求帮助 - Beard家人谈他的去世
zh.summary: 前女超联赛经理Matt Beard的家人公开谈论了足球管理的严重心理负担。他们倡导进行系统性变革，以更好地支持经理的心理健康和福祉。

title: Sources: Estêvão out of Brazil squad for World Cup...
summary: Injured Chelsea forward Estêvão has been excluded from Brazil's 2026 World Cup squad, ending his tournament hopes. The 55-man provisional roster includes returning star Neymar.
content: Injured Chelsea forward Estêvão will miss the 2026 World Cup after being left off Brazil's preliminary list, though Neymar was included in the 55-man roster, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：Estêvão被排除在巴西世界杯阵容之外...
zh.summary: 受伤的切尔西前锋Estêvão已被排除在巴西2026年世界杯阵容之外，结束了他对锦标赛的希望。55人的临时名单包括回归的明星内马尔。

title: De Zerbi fumes at 'not calm' referee in Spurs draw...
summary: Tottenham manager Roberto De Zerbi criticized officiating decisions following his team's 1-1 draw with Leeds United on Monday. The result leaves Spurs battling to avoid Premier League relegation.
content: Tottenham coach Roberto De Zerbi hit out at the officiating after his team's Monday draw with Leeds, which left Spurs still fighting to secure their Premier League survival.

zh.title: 德泽尔比为热刺平局中"不镇定"的裁判决定而愤怒
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺主教练罗伯托·德泽尔比在球队周一与利兹联队1:1平局后批评了裁判的判罚决定。这个结果使热刺继续为避免英超降级而苦苦挣扎。

title: 'Sea of blaugrana' celebrate Barcelona LaLiga win
summary: Barcelona's streets filled with supporters celebrating the club's latest La Liga title triumph on Monday. The massive turnout demonstrated the significance of the championship victory.
content: The streets of Barcelona turned into a "sea of blaugrana" Monday to celebrate the team's La Liga title win.

zh.title: "蓝红色之海"庆祝巴塞罗那西甲联赛冠军
zh.summary: 周一，巴塞罗那街道上挤满了庆祝俱乐部最新西甲联赛冠军胜利的支持者。大规模的人群聚集彰显了这次锦标赛胜利的重要意义。

title: Atleti says USMNT's Cardoso set for ankle surgery
summary: Atlético Madrid announced that USMNT midfielder Johnny Cardoso will undergo ankle surgery to address right ankle damage. The procedure may impact his availability for club and country in the coming weeks.
content: Atlético Madrid announced Monday that United States midfielder Johnny Cardoso will undergo surgery to repair damage to his right ankle.

zh.title: 马竞表示美国队卡多索将接受踝关节手术
zh.summary: 马德里竞技队宣布美国队中场球员约翰尼·卡多索将接受踝关节手术以治疗右踝损伤。该手术可能会影响他在未来几周内对俱乐部和国家队的可用性。

title: Napoli loss sets up crowded Serie A top-4 sprint
summary: Bologna secured a dramatic 3-2 victory over Napoli with a stoppage-time goal from Jonathan Rowe on Monday. The result intensifies the battle for Serie A's top-four positions in the final stretch of the season.
content: A stoppage time goal from Jonathan Rowe gave Bologna a 3-2 win against Napoli in a pulsating Serie A encounter on Monday that leaves the race for the top four in Italy extremely tight.

zh.title: 那不勒斯失利 意甲前四争夺进入白热化
zh.summary: 博洛尼亚在周一通过乔纳森·罗的伤停补时进球以3-2的比分戏剧性击败那不勒斯。这场比赛结果激化了赛季最后阶段意甲前四席位的争夺。

title: Curacao boss out amid reports of Advocaat return
summary: Curaçao parted ways with coach Fred Rutten following the team's World Cup qualifying success. Reports indicate Dutch veteran Dick Advocaat is set to return to the managerial role.
content: World Cup debutant Curaçao parted company with coach Fred Rutten on Monday amid reports Dutch veteran Dick Advocaat is returning to the team he led through qualifying.

zh.title: 库拉索主帅离任 传迪克·阿德沃卡特将回归
zh.summary: 库拉索在世界杯预选赛成功后与主教练弗雷德·鲁腾分道扬镳。报道指出荷兰老将迪克·阿德沃卡特将重返主教练职位。

title: Sources: James leaving Loons for Colombia camp
summary: James Rodríguez will depart Minnesota United after the team's May 13 match to join Colombia's World Cup preparation camp. The move marks his focus shift toward international competition ahead of the tournament.
content: James Rodríguez will depart Minnesota United FC following the match on Wednesday, May 13 to join the Colombian national team camp ahead of the FIFA World Cup, sources confirm to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：詹姆斯离开明尼苏达联队赴哥伦比亚营地
zh.summary: 詹姆斯·罗德里格斯将在明尼苏达联队5月13日的比赛后离队，加入哥伦比亚世界杯备战营。这一举动标志着他的关注重点转向世界杯前的国家队竞争。

title: Tottenham draw vs. Leeds: Roberto De Zerbi's side ...
summary: Tottenham drew 1-1 at home with Leeds United, missing an opportunity to extend their lead over West Ham in the Premier League survival race. The dropped points leave Spurs' top-flight status uncertain.
content: Tottenham Hotspur missed the chance to boost their Premier League survival hopes by opening up a four-point gap to West Ham as they were held to a 1-1 home draw with Leeds United on Monday.

zh.title: 托特纳姆对阵利兹联：德泽比的球队...
zh.summary: 托特纳姆在主场与利兹联1-1平局，错过了在英超保级竞争中扩大对西汉姆联领先优势的机会。这两分的丢失使热刺的英超席位状况不确定。
